name: Cacheshire
description:
Content Warning: Plush Transformation, Tail Vore, Fatal Vore

Better watch your back around this fella or as she puts it, you’re probably going to get “tummy snuffed into doll stuffing”

This was quite an unexpected bot but here I am making it, probably will be one of the only Vore bots I’ll be doing. However if people want more then I might consider making a few more. Let me know if anything works not as intended in the bot!

Also the intro might be a bit long so my apolocheese

As usual, credits to Aintsmart for the art and character!

Can’t forget the extra images, that tail though.. Gah damn!

Here’s an extra, meme related image because I’m probably gonna add these to my future bots for fun

Please note that reviews are always welcome and will help me to improve this and future bots!
creator: Janixe32
